project: OpenAIP — Digital Governance System Utilizing Large Language Models for Data Analysis
acceptance_definition: Accepted = question is supported/in-scope AND the system provides an answer grounded in retrieved, validated AIP passages. Unsupported questions should be refused and are labeled expected_accepted=false.
